The '''Destruction of Pammant''' was a cataclysmic event that took place shortly before the [[Battle of Coruscant/Legends|Battle of Coruscant]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

==The accident==
The underground factories on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Pammant/Legends|Pammant]] had been utilized throughout the Wars for [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] [[Starship/Legends|warship]] production.

That came to an end when the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] [[Praetor-class Star Battlecruiser/Legends|''Praetor''-class Star Battlecruiser]] ''[[Quaestor]]'s'' [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]] was damaged by torpedo droids and an unintended jump to [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] occurred, causing the Quaestor to collide with the planet, fracturing it to its core and polluting the [[Atmosphere/Legends|atmosphere]] with [[Radiation/Legends|radiation]].

==Aftermath==
The loss of Pammant's [[Shipyard/Legends|shipyards]] led to a decrease in ship production for the Confederacy.
